top_signals.title: Iran Conflict Escalates as US Announces Third Troop Death
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran engaged in a quickening series of tit-for-tat attacks, causing fresh chaos in the Middle East as the US military announced the death of a third US troop in the past two days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
